creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
After reading up a bit, it still looks like a MOVED entry is the most straightforward way to handle this for folks:

net-mgmt/cnagios|net-mgmt/cnagios@nagios3|2020-11-17|Moved to nagios3 or nagios4 flavored version

I'm marking the patch approved, but I'm open to any input you have before we seek commit. Thanks!
